meta.author: Your Name
meta.description: A short description of what this package provides

description.de: Kurze Beschreibung, was dieser Typ tut
description.en: Short description of what this type does

phases.promptTemplate:
<role>You are an expert in [your domain].</role>

<task>
**Goal:** (describe what you want to achieve)
**Context:** (relevant background information)
**Constraints:** (any limitations or requirements)

Provide a detailed, actionable response.
</task>

<rules>
- Be specific and concrete
- Use examples where helpful
- Structure the response clearly
</rules>

<output_format>
Provide your response as a structured document with clear headings.
</output_format>

<role>You are a thorough reviewer specializing in [your domain].</role>

<task>
Review the following:
**Content:** (paste or describe what to review)
**Focus areas:** (what aspects to examine)
**Standards:** (what quality criteria to apply)
</task>

<output_format>
Provide findings as:
1. Summary assessment
2. Specific issues found (with severity)
3. Concrete improvement suggestions
</output_format>
